# .NET 10.0 Upgrade Progress

## Overview

Upgrading 3 projects from .NET 9 to .NET 10.0 (LTS) using All-At-Once strategy. All projects will be updated simultaneously with package upgrades and API breaking change fixes.

**Progress**: 0/4 tasks complete (0%) ![0%](https://progress-bar.xyz/0)

## Tasks

- 🔄 01-prerequisites: Validate Prerequisites
- 🔲 02-atomic-upgrade: Update All Projects to .NET 10.0
- 🔲 03-validation: Verify Tests and Build
- 🔲 04-cleanup: Address Deprecated Packages (Optional)
